visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand in a brightly lit warehouse aisle, likely a Costco based on the large red and blue logo overlay. The woman on the left wears a dark beret and a dark off-the-shoulder top, holding a large watermelon-shaped plush pillow and a strawberry one. The woman on the right wears a white, textured dress and holds a large avocado plush and a lemon wedge plush. They both smile widely and sway rhythmically. Yellow and orange text overlays appear at the bottom. The background consists of tall industrial shelving packed with large items, and a few blurred shoppers are visible in the distance. (2) The camera zooms slightly as the women begin to showcase the pillows individually. The woman in the white dress lifts the lemon wedge pillow, which has vibrant yellow and white segments and a green backing. The woman in the beret holds the strawberry, which is bright red with black seed patterns and a green felt stem at the top. They alternate moving the watermelon (pink with black seeds and green rind) and the avocado (green skin, light green interior, and a brown pit) toward the camera. Large text indicating the price 459元 and a descriptive slogan appears prominently at the bottom. (3) The scene transitions into a demonstration of the pillows' softness. The women press their faces into the plush surfaces of the strawberry and avocado pillows to emphasize their squishy texture. The woman on the left leans toward the right, playfully bumping the pillows together. The lighting remains consistent, bright, and flat, typical of a large retail warehouse. They continue to speak with animated facial expressions, including raised eyebrows and wide smiles, while gesturing toward the items to show their scale. (4) The focus shifts to a specific feature: a hidden zipper. The woman in the white dress turns the avocado pillow over to reveal a green zipper track on its dark green skin. She pulls the zipper slightly to show the opening, while the woman in the beret looks on with an exaggerated expression of surprise. A red bubble with white text pops up on the screen to highlight the zipper. The background remains the warehouse aisle with pillows and boxes visible on the shelves. (5) In the final phase, both women hug all four fruit pillows together in a group embrace. They wave at the camera and continue their high-energy delivery. The watermelon, strawberry, lemon, and avocado pillows are clustered in the center of the frame. The video ends with a celebratory graphic or text overlay as they both smile and gesture goodbye with their hands, showcasing the complete set one last time.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 水果和你說再見. (2) [Subtitle]: 冰淇淋一起88. (3) [Variety]: 459元超划算. [Variety]: 超萌四季水果抱枕. (4) [Subtitle]: 陪大家一起長大. (5) [Subtitle]: 459元總共有四個圖案. (6) [Subtitle]: 首先是 大又甜的西瓜. (7) [Subtitle]: 還有非常健康的酪梨. (8) [Subtitle]: 然後還有完整的草莓. (9) [Subtitle]: 夏季代表檸檬. (10) [Subtitle]: 非常的可愛. (11) [Subtitle]: 它草莓這個蒂頭也做得很生動. (12) [Subtitle]: 因為最重要它是那種比較立體的. (13) [Subtitle]: 所以你放在地上. (14) [Subtitle]: 給寶寶當做那種安全靠枕. (15) [Subtitle]: 沒有就撞到~哦. (16) [Subtitle]: 很安全. (17) [Subtitle]: 很可愛疊放在四角. (18) [Subtitle]: 你就是最快樂的. [Variety]: 水果家園. (19) [Subtitle]: 且最重要的是它還有. (20) [Variety]: 拉鍊. (21) [Subtitle]: 各位爸爸媽媽們的私房錢哎. (22) [Subtitle]: 知道藏哪了嗎. (23) [Subtitle]: 原來是藏在裡面. (24) [Subtitle]: 它棉花給的很蓬鬆. (25) [Subtitle]: 所以這些水果都. [Variety]: 非常地立體. (26) [Subtitle]: 我說水狗. (27) [Subtitle]: 水~狗. (28) [Subtitle]: 我覺得還蠻不錯的. (29) [Subtitle]: 就做的非常的可愛. (30) [Subtitle]: 可是應該可以等特價. (31) [Subtitle]: 會更划算.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 male shopper in a green shirt in the background, 1 female shopper in pink in the distance.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a dark beret with an off-the-shoulder black top and a black skirt. The other woman has long dark hair and wears a white textured off-the-shoulder dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior featuring high ceilings, industrial lighting, and tall orange metal racks filled with merchandise. Other pillows and household goods are visible on lower shelves nearby.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with two high-pitched female voices speaking in unison over a high-tempo, upbeat pop-style BGM with a strong electronic beat. Their speech is rapid and enthusiastic, with rising intonations indicating excitement. A distinct whoosh sound effect marks the transition into the main introduction. No ambient noise is audible, suggesting a clean field recording or post-produced audio track. (2) As the speakers describe the different fruits, the BGM continues at a consistent volume. Every time a new pillow is highlighted, a short, percussive pop or ding SFX is layered over the vocals. The voices maintain a high arousal level and positive valence. The acoustic texture is bright with a high spectral centroid weight. There is a slight change in vocal intensity as they lean in. (3) A comedic squish sound effect is heard as they demonstrate the pillows' plushness. The vocal delivery becomes slightly more exaggerated and playful, with increased pitch variability. The BGM remains a steady rhythmic foundation. The voices are clear and well-enunciated, with professional broadcasting clarity. The signal-to-noise ratio is high, with no background chatter from the warehouse environment audible. (4) A shimmer or magic sound effect triggers as the hidden zipper is revealed. One voice takes the lead, speaking with a teasing, 'did you know?' tone, while the second voice provides short, high-pitched vocal reactions like 'Oh!' or 'Wow!'. The music remains constant but feels slightly lower in the mix during this detailed explanation. The spectral flux is dynamic due to the interplay. (5) The voices reach a peak in volume and pitch as they conclude the segment. A final ding SFX sounds, followed by a quick fade-out of both the speech and the BGM. The ending is crisp with a hard cut. The overall production is highly fragmented with frequent edits, characteristic of social media promotional content. The dynamic range is compressed to ensure consistent loudness.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction of Varieties -> Functional Softness Demo -> Hidden Feature Reveal -> Final Value Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and review a set of four oversized fruit-themed plush pillows sold at Costco. The video utilizes high-energy female hosts and fast-paced editing to create a sense of fun and urgency, targeting shoppers looking for home decor or gifts.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product price, location in a recognizable retail chain, and active recommendation by the creators.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video's success relies on the rhythmic coordination between the two creators and the use of 'Variety' style text overlays that highlight specific product features and prices.
